subject: Integrate helm validator with SDC-BE
commit_message:
Integrate helm validator with SDC-BE

- Read helm validator configuration
- Add call to helm validator during Helm validation
- Add JUnit tests
- Fix display message when CNF upload is unsuccessful
- Show warning messages from validation after CNF upload

Issue-ID: SDC-3185
Signed-off-by: Joanna Jeremicz <joanna.jeremicz@nokia.com>
Change-Id: If197d557e6ddef4a07bef986d7cf133aedcb2cc5
Signed-off-by: Piotr Marcinkiewicz <piotr.marcinkiewicz@nokia.com>

I'll let you know when we finished.

Patch Set 22:

In Patchsets 17 - 22 helm validator implementation has been moved from openecomp-sdc-vendor-software-product-manager to openecomp-sdc-validation-impl.
I believe now it is cleaner in code (we use the same validation mechanisms as other validations) and it is more consistent in GUI (we run validation on button "proceed validation").
The change has been tested.
Please review.

Patch Set 22: Code-Review+1

Looks good to me (after the recent changes described by Piotr).

(2 comments)

Looks good. Two minor things.
